source_motion_tail.description: moving no-audio LOC/Carpathia water source tail for the full theme outro

signal_interruption.purpose: brief analog interruption between the LOC archival body and moving Carpathia-water tail
brief analog interruption between the LOC archival body and moving Carpathia-water tail

full_picture_crt_texture.purpose: apply one continuous CRT/analog texture over the assembled Titanic hook, body, and tail proof

visual_strategy.hook_visual: LOC archival crowded cabin/deck movement opens the proof before narration
visual_strategy.hook_selection_reason: source-led Titanic deck/crowd visual, not the same ship-scale body shot that begins at proof 3.0s
visual_strategy.body_after_hook: existing pass14 LOC archival body order preserved with signal interruptions at every internal boundary
visual_strategy.tail_visual: moving Carpathia-water LOC source span for the theme outro tail

review_request: Judge whether the crowded-deck Titanic hook plus hard theme punch improves scroll-stop, whether the all-boundary signal interruptions feel consistent, and whether the moving Carpathia-water tail avoids freeze/repeat.
